scripts.build: npm run validate:catalog && npm run validate:latexdo && node scripts/build-site.mjs
scripts.ci:pr: npm run validate:catalog && npm run validate:latexdo && node scripts/validate-pr.mjs && node scripts/build-site.mjs && node --check app.js && node --check scripts/build-site.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-catalog.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-latexdo-compat.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-pr.mjs && node --check scripts/pr-bot-comment.mjs
